commands.review_summary:
The PR preserves runtime-required and explicitly allowlisted tools, especially `message`, through local-model lean filtering during tool construction and embedded-run schema projection, with focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +57, Tests +138. Total +195 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: current main's lean filter removes `message` unconditionally while embedded attempts can require `message` for forced or `message_tool_only` replies; I did not run a live provider turn in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The PR is protected and maintainer-labeled; no concrete ClawSweeper repair remains, so the next action is maintainer landing/canonical-branch judgment with refreshed merge-result proof as needed.

target.title: fix(agents): preserve runtime tools in lean mode
target.body:
## Summary

- keeps `localModelLean` from stripping runtime-required tools when replies must go through the `message` tool
- preserves explicit runtime allowlists plus `forceMessageTool` and `sourceReplyDeliveryMode: "message_tool_only"` through both tool construction and embedded-run schema projection
- adds focused coverage for forced message tools, message-tool-only replies, grouping, and wildcard preservation without disabling lean filtering

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.create-openclaw-coding-tools.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts --reporter=dot` passed, 125 tests
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/local-model-lean.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.ts src/agents/agent-tools.create-openclaw-coding-tools.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts` passed
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/local-model-lean.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.ts src/agents/agent-tools.create-openclaw-coding-tools.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts` passed
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD` passed
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` passed with no actionable findings

## Remote proof

- Earlier AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed` passed for this change: run `run_b49852fc0666`, lease `cbx_5629af2a5f3c`, machine `c7a.8xlarge`, exit 0.
- A later broad rerun reached unrelated current-main type failures. Those are tracked in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/88621, which now has AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed` proof: run `run_c069f1613aed`, lease `cbx_2739bf102a52`, machine `c7a.8xlarge`, exit 0.

## What was not tested

- Live Ollama/provider run. Local Ollama API was unavailable on this machine, so this is covered by focused runtime-tool tests plus Crabbox changed-gate proof where current main permits it.
target.author: vincentkoc
